mentions.note: Clobbered this week as competition intensified in once-dominant pulse field ablation business; lost competitive moat.
Competition more severe than anticipated; recent earnings miss and stock underperformance surprise. Thesis broken; avoid.
Competition much more severe than expected; CEO Mike Mahoney not controlling the competitive landscape; stock underperforming.
Competition too strong, always one step behind. Wait to see stock bottom before buying.
Don't understand the fall but too risky to buy more given competition; hold position but don't add.
Hit new lows despite quality; Cramer confused by fall, won't sell but can't buy more.
Down almost 50% YTD; medical device group is awful with weak fundamentals, avoid until sentiment shifts.
Premium heart device leader cut in half; now 14x earnings with mediocre growth. Multiple compression reflects market repricing of legacy medtech versus AI infrastructure.
Medical device sector is from Hades; one good product didn't deliver sales. Entire device cohort (Intuitive, Abbott, Medtronic) crushed; just too hard to own.
